2605.00440.title: On the Role of Artificial Intelligence in Human-Machine Symbiosis
2605.00440.paper_summary: The evolution of artificial intelligence (AI) has rendered the boundary between humanity and computational machinery increasingly ambiguous. In the presence of more interwoven relationships within human-machine symbiosis, the very notion of AI-generated information becomes difficult to define, as such information arises not from either humans or machines in isolation, but from their mutual shaping. Therefore, a more pertinent question lies not merely in whether AI has participated, but in how it has participated. In general, the role assumed by AI is often specified, either implicitly or explicitly, in the input prompt, yet becomes less apparent or altogether unobservable when the generated content alone is available. Once detached from the dialogue context, the functional role may no longer be traceable. This study considers the problem of tracing the functional role played by AI in natural language generation. A methodology is proposed to infer the latent role specified by the prompt, embed this role into the content during the probabilistic generation process and subsequently recover the nature of AI participation from the resulting text. Experimentation is conducted under a representative scenario in which AI acts either as an assistive agent that edits human-written content or as a creative agent that generates new content from a brief concept. The experimental results support the validity of the proposed methodology in terms of discrimination between roles, robustness against perturbations and preservation of linguistic quality. We envision that this study may contribute to future research on the ethics of AI with regard to whether AI has been used fairly, transparently and appropriately.
2605.00440.paper_summary_zh: 人工智慧（AI）的演變使得人類與計算機械之間的界限變得越來越模糊。<lb/>在更緊密的人機共生關係中，AI生成資訊的概念變得難以定義，因為這些資訊並非單獨來自人類或機器，而是源於它們的相互塑造。<lb/>因此，更相關的問題不僅在於AI是否參與，而在於它是如何參與的。<lb/>一般來說，AI所承擔的角色通常在輸入提示中被明確或隱含地指定，但當僅有生成的內容可用時，這一角色變得不那麼明顯或完全不可觀察。<lb/>一旦脫離對話上下文，功能角色可能不再可追溯。<lb/>本研究考慮了追蹤AI在自然語言生成中所扮演的功能角色的問題。<lb/>提出了一種方法論，以推斷提示中指定的潛在角色，將這一角色嵌入到概率生成過程中的內容中，並隨後從生成的文本中恢復AI參與的性質。<lb/>在一個代表性的場景下進行實驗，其中AI作為編輯人類撰寫內容的輔助代理或作為從簡短概念生成新內容的創造性代理。<lb/>實驗結果支持所提出方法論的有效性，無論是在角色區分、對擾動的穩健性以及語言質量的保留方面。<lb/>我們預見這項研究可能有助於未來關於AI倫理的研究，特別是在AI是否被公平、透明和適當地使用方面。
2605.00440.author: Ching-Chun Chang et.al.
2605.00440.authors: Ching-Chun Chang, Yuchen Guo, Hanrui Wang, Timo Spinde, Isao Echizen
